examples: The creature was foaming at the mouth.
He had to fill bowl after bowl of the foaming milk for the hungry children.
Five men were seen in the sea, struggling with the foaming breakers.
The blazered white British gent with his pint of foaming bitter is portrayed as an endangered species.
Caswell-Massey's foaming milk bath contains whole milk along with 18 other ingredients, including cocamidopropyl betaine and cucumber.
